channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large gas canisters dumped on Lassell Street and, 1st June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ballast Quay, Greenwich

item.title: Constant fly-tipping, 1st June
item.description:
Hi there, This is third time I report new fly-tipping in this area on a space of 7 days. This time someone just left there their rubbish. Please remove that and add a sign or camera to stop this from happening going forward. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin on Gurdon Road, 1st June
item.description:
Hi there, There is at least once a week situation where the council does not empty the bins in this area. Can this be addressed asap, please. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on the square for over 8 months., 1st June
item.description:
This car has been left untouched for over 8 months. It has no front number plate. Its MOT expired last August and it has been untaxed since last September.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leabank Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin bags dumped on the pavement outside, 1st June
item.description:
Several black bin bags have been left on the pavement against the railings here. They have been here for a few days now. They are not mine and are taking up the footway. Please could they be collected and removed. Photo attached.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of wood and other including black bags, 31st May
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped some garden stuff and black bags in the street and the streets are just a complete mess they need a good sweep and when they sweep they need to pick the rubbish up instead of leaving it in piles just for it to be kicked or blown around the street again also none of the black lid bins have been emptied so there is rubbish spilling out of them also
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passfield Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st May
item.description:
Witnessed a man dumping rubbish from a van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On 31/05/2026 at 16:18, a dog walker stopped on the pavement next to the entrance to my home, allowed his fog to ease itselfed and walked away without leaming ip the faeces. This was caught on camera., 31st May
item.description:
This happed on 31/05/2026 at 16:18

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pennine Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
